income_thresholds.description: Families with annual income below Rs 3 lakh: completely FREE coverage (no premium). Verified through Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP).
Families with annual income between Rs 3 lakh and Rs 6 lakh: Rs 4,000 per year premium for same Rs 5 lakh coverage. Paid via PPP-linked bank account.

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Haryana with a valid Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP) are eligible
Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP / Family ID) is mandatory. Without PPP, enrollment is not possible.
Families with annual income above Rs 6 lakh are not eligible for Chirayu Haryana
Families covered under CGHS or ESIC are excluded
Families in Rs 3-6 lakh income bracket must pay Rs 4,000/year premium. Coverage lapses if premium is not paid.

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP). All members listed on PPP are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members. No cap on family size.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP)
required_documents.notes: Haryana Family ID is MANDATORY. All eligibility verification and income data comes from PPP. Apply at Antyodaya Saral Kendra if you don't have one.

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC and linking with PPP

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to PPP and Aadhaar for OTP verification

required_documents.name: Bank Account Details (for premium tier)
required_documents.local_name_hi: बैंक खाता विवरण (प्रीमियम श्रेणी के लिए)
required_documents.notes: Required only for families in Rs 3-6 lakh income bracket paying Rs 4,000/year premium

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new Chirayu card generation

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Ensure you have a Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP). If not, apply at nearest Antyodaya Saral Kendra.
Step 2: Check eligibility at chirayuayushmanharyana.in with PPP number
Step 3: If income below Rs 3 lakh (auto-verified via PPP): enrollment is FREE and may be automatic
Step 4: If income Rs 3-6 lakh: pay Rs 4,000/year premium online or at Saral Kendra
Step 5: Visit CSC or empanelled hospital for e-KYC (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 6: Chirayu Ayushman card generated and printed
Step 7: Card valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in Haryana for cashless treatment up to Rs 5 lakh
description_for_embedding: Ayushman Bharat Chirayu Haryana is Haryana's tiered state health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh per family per year. Two tiers based on income verified via Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP / Family ID): families with income below Rs 3 lakh get completely free coverage, while families with income between Rs 3 lakh and Rs 6 lakh pay Rs 4,000 per year premium for the same coverage. PPP is mandatory for enrollment. Covers hospitalization, surgery, and medical treatment at empanelled hospitals. Enrollment via chirayuayushmanharyana.in or Antyodaya Saral Kendra.
